---
title: "Certificates"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="editorial-page">
  <div class="editorial-page-head">
    <div class="editorial-page-index">/CERTIFICATES</div>
    <h1>Certificates & Professional Development</h1>
  </div>

  <section class="editorial-block">
    <div class="editorial-subhead">
      <div class="editorial-mini-index">01</div>
      <h2>Overview</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="editorial-body-copy">
      <p>
        This section presents selected certificates that reflect continued professional development through independent online learning. These courses supported my growth in data skills, digital tools, and business communication.
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="editorial-grid editorial-grid-three">
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Data Analysis with Excel</h3>
      <p>Focused on structured spreadsheet analysis, data interpretation, and business-facing use of Excel.</p>
      <a href="images/Kubicle Diploma Data Analysis with Excel.pdf" class="editorial-link" target="_blank">Open certificate</a>
    </article>
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Data Preparation with SQL</h3>
      <p>Introduced core SQL concepts for handling, preparing, and organising data in a more structured way.</p>
      <a href="images/Kubicle Diploma Data Preparation with SQL.pdf" class="editorial-link" target="_blank">Open certificate</a>
    </article>
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Presenting Data with Word</h3>
      <p>Focused on professional presentation of information, document communication, and data storytelling.</p>
      <a href="images/Kubicle Diploma Presenting Data with Word.pdf" class="editorial-link" target="_blank">Open certificate</a>
    </article>
  </section>
</section>
```
